params.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
from Cocoa import NSImage, NSRect, NSZeroPoint, nil
import Vision, os

img = NSImage.alloc().initWithContentsOfFile_("/tmp/c.png")
cg = img.CGImageForProposedRect_context_hints_(NSRect(0,0,img.size.width,img.size.height), nil, nil)

req = Vision.VNRecognizeTextRequest.alloc().init()
req.setRecognitionLevel_(1)
req.setUsesLanguageCorrection_(False)
Vision.VNImageRequestHandler.alloc().initWithCGImage_options_(cg, {}).performRequests_error_([req], nil)

W, H = 1440, 776
for obs in req.results() or []:
    t = obs.topCandidates_(1)
    if t.count() > 0:
        b = obs.boundingBox()
        x = int(b.origin.x * W)
        y = int((1 - b.origin.y - b.size.height) * H)
        s = t.firstObject().string()
        print(f"{x},{y}|{s}")

open -n /Applications/Google\ Chrome.app --args --remote-debugging-port=9222 --no-sandbox --disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled 2>/dev/null &

# 探测 CDP

sleep 1
open -n /Applications/Google\ Chrome.app --args --remote-debugging-port=9222 --no-sandbox --disable-blink-features=AutomationControlled 2>/dev/null &
sleep 5

params.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
from Cocoa import *
import subprocess, sys

# 获取 Chrome PID
p = subprocess.run(['pgrep', '-x', 'Google Chrome'], capture_output=True, text=True)
if not p.stdout.strip():
    print("No Chrome")
    sys.exit(1)
pid = int(p.stdout.strip().split()[0])

# 创建 AXUIElement for Chrome
app = ObjCInstance(dispatch_data_from_type_create(None, 1, pid))

# 用 Foundation 的 API
from Cocoa import NSSet, NSArray, NSDictionary

def ax_attr(elem, name):
    """获取 AX 属性"""
    try:
        val = elem.attributeValue_(name)
        return val if val is not None else None
    except:
        return None

def find_buttons(elem, depth=0, results=None):
    if results is None:
        results = []
    try:
        role = str(ax_attr(elem, "AXRole") or "")
        desc = str(ax_attr(elem, "AXDescription") or "")
        title = str(ax_attr(elem, "AXTitle") or "")
        help_ = str(ax_attr(elem, "AXHelp") or "")
        
        pos = ax_attr(elem, "AXPosition")
        sz = ax_attr(elem, "AXSize")
        
        px = py = sx = sy = 0
        if pos:
            px = int(pos.x)
            py = int(pos.y)
        if sz:
            sx = int(sz.width)
            sy = int(sz.height)
        
        is_btn = role in ("AXButton", "AXLink", "AXCheckBox", "AXTextField", "AXPopUpButton")
        is_nav = role in ("AXGroup", "AXScrollArea", "AXStaticText")
        
        label = desc or title or help_ or ""
        label = label.strip()
        
        # 过滤太小或无意义的元素
        if sx > 15 and sy > 5:
            prefix = "  " if not is_btn else "BTN"
            results.append((px, py, sx, sy, role, label, is_btn))
            if is_btn and label:
                print(f"{prefix} [{px},{py}][{sx}x{sy}] {role} | {label}")
        
        # 递归子元素
        children = ax_attr(elem, "AXChildren")
        if children:
            for child in children:
                find_buttons(child, depth+1, results)
    except:
        pass
    return results

print(f"=== Chrome Window Elements ===")
print(f"PID: {pid}")

# 获取窗口
windows_ref = Foundation.NSMutableArray.alloc().init()
ret = Foundation.AXUIElementCopyAttributeValue(app, Foundation.kAXWindowsAttribute, windows_ref)
if ret != 0:
    print(f"CopyAttributeValue failed: {ret}")
    sys.exit(1)

windows = list(windows_ref)
print(f"Windows: {len(windows)}")

if windows:
    win = windows[0]
    print(f"Window role: {ax_attr(win, 'AXRole')}")
    
    # 获取所有可点击元素
    all_elems = find_buttons(win)
    print(f"\nTotal elements: {len(all_elems)}")
    print(f"Clickable: {sum(1 for e in all_elems if e[6])}")

# 正确写法: tell document 1 而不是 "in front document"
cat > /tmp/js_chrome.scpt <<'SCRIPT'
tell application "Google Chrome"
    activate
    set theURL to URL of document 1
    set theTitle to title of document 1
    return "URL: " & theURL & ", Title: " & theTitle
end tell
SCRIPT

osascript /tmp/js_chrome.scpt 2>&1

params.command:
cat > /tmp/chrome_test.scpt <<'SCRIPT'
tell application "Google Chrome"
    activate
    set u to URL of active tab of front window
    return u
end tell
SCRIPT
osascript /tmp/chrome_test.scpt 2>&1

cat > /tmp/find_feishu.scpt <<'SCRIPT'
tell application "Google Chrome"
    activate
    set output to ""
    repeat with w in windows
        set tabCount to (count of tabs of w)
        repeat with i from 1 to tabCount
            set t to tab i of w
            set u to URL of t
            set ti to title of t
            if u contains "feishu" or ti contains "飞书" then
                set output to output & "MATCH! Tab " & i & ": " & u & " | " & ti & return
            else
                set output to output & "Tab " & i & ": " & u & return
            end if
        end repeat
    end repeat
    return output
end tell
SCRIPT
osascript /tmp/find_feishu.scpt 2>&1

# 用 osascript 打开飞书事件页
cat > /tmp/open_feishu.scpt <<'SCRIPT'
tell application "Google Chrome"
    activate
    open location "https://open.feishu.cn/app/cli_a96a631086f99ccb/event"
    delay 2
    set u to URL of active tab of front window
    set ti to title of active tab of front window
    return "Opened: " & u & " | " & ti
end tell
SCRIPT
osascript /tmp/open_feishu.scpt 2>&1

cat > /tmp/js_test.scpt <<'SCRIPT'
tell application "Google Chrome"
    activate
    delay 1
    set js to "return document.title + '|' + window.location.href"
    set result to do JavaScript js in active tab of front window
    return result
end tell
SCRIPT
osascript /tmp/js_test.scpt 2>&1

params.command:
# 把 AppleScript 编译成二进制 .scpt 再执行
cat > /tmp/js_chrome.applescript <<'SCRIPT'
tell application "Google Chrome"
    activate
end tell
delay 1
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Google Chrome"
        set frontmost to true
        delay 0.5
        -- 尝试 UI scripting 方式
        set frontWin to window 1
        set winRole to AXRole of frontWin
        return "Window role: " & winRole
    end tell
end tell
SCRIPT

# 编译
osacompile -o /tmp/js_chrome.scpt /tmp/js_chrome.applescript 2>&1 && echo "编译成功"
osascript /tmp/js_chrome.scpt 2>&1

params.command:
# 用 Python 生成 AppleScript 文件并编译
python3 <<'PYEOF'
script = '''tell application "Google Chrome"
    activate
end tell
delay 1
tell application "System Events"
    tell process "Google Chrome"
        set frontmost to true
        delay 0.5
        set frontDoc to active tab of front window
        set js to "JSON.stringify({title: document.title, url: window.location.href, h2: document.querySelector('h2,h1,.title') ? document.querySelector('h2,h1,.title').innerText : 'N/A'})"
        set r to do JavaScript js in frontDoc
        return r
    end tell
end tell
'''
with open('/tmp/feishu_js.applescript', 'w') as f:
    f.write(script)
print("Written:", len(script), "chars")
PYEOF

# 编译
osacompile -o /tmp/feishu_js.scpt /tmp/feishu_js.applescript 2>&1 && echo "✅ 编译成功" || echo "❌ 编译失败"

# 执行
osascript /tmp/feishu_js.scpt 2>&1
